title: Tagine Chicken with Apricot and Almonds
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with chicken, apricots, and almonds, slow-cooked in a rich and spicy tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the dried apricots, sliced almonds, cinnamon, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Cover the tagine or Dutch oven and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
